hono@4.12.10: Hono: Non-breaking space prefix bypass in cookie name handling in getCookie() (fix: 4.12.12)
hono@4.12.10: Hono missing validation of cookie name on write path in setCookie() (fix: 4.12.12)
hono@4.12.10: hono Improperly Handles JSX Attribute Names Allows HTML Injection in hono/jsx SSR (fix: 4.12.14)
postcss@8.5.8: PostCSS has XSS via Unescaped </style> in its CSS Stringify Output (fix: 8.5.10)
